title: Reproduce Before Prescribing Fixes
guidance: Debugging should start by reproducing or tightly modeling the failure before proposing a fix
do: Capture repro steps logs and impacted paths first
dont: Do not jump to a code change from anecdotal symptoms alone

title: Root Cause Needs Evidence
guidance: A root-cause claim should connect symptoms to a concrete state transition log trace or code path
do: Show the causal chain and supporting evidence
dont: Do not label a guess as the confirmed cause

title: Hand Off Implementation to the Owner
guidance: Debugger owns diagnosis and fix direction but the owning specialist should implement the repair
do: Provide repro root cause and the right handoff target
dont: Do not quietly implement domain changes under the debugger role
